import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024  # visual: ['B', 256, 1024]
        text_dim = 768     # text: ['B', 77, 768]
        
        hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Attention-based pooling
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Projection layers
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion layer
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 13)
        
    def attention_pool(self, x, attn_layer):
        attn_weights = F.softmax(attn_layer(x), dim=1)
        pooled = (x * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)
        return pooled
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention-based pooling
        visual_pooled = self.attention_pool(visual, self.visual_attn)
        text_pooled = self.attention_pool(text, self.text_attn)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate(concat))
        gated = gate * visual_feat + (1 - gate) * text_feat
        
        # Fusion and classify
        fused = self.fusion(gated)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 128
        
        # Modality projections
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden_dim, num_heads=4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 128]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 128]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(v, t, t)
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(t, v, v)
        
        v = self.norm1(v + v_attended)
        t = self.norm2(t + t_attended)
        
        # Pool and classify
        v_pool = v.mean(dim=1)
        t_pool = t.mean(dim=1)
        
        fused = torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool], dim=-1)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Fixed dimensions based on API contract
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Adaptive pooling to handle sequence dimensions
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim)
        
        # Bilinear fusion
        self.bilinear = nn.Bilinear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, 128)
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(128, 13)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 1024)
        v = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)
        # text: (B, 77, 768) -> (B, 768)
        t = self.text_pool(text.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)
        
        # Project to hidden dim
        v = F.gelu(self.v_proj(v))
        t = F.gelu(self.t_proj(t))
        
        # Gating
        combined = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate(combined))
        v = v * gate
        t = t * (1 - gate)
        
        # Bilinear fusion
        fused = self.bilinear(v, t)
        fused = F.gelu(fused)
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Projections
        self.proj_v = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.proj_t = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.cross_t = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling
        v_attn = F.softmax(self.v_attn(visual), dim=1)
        v_pooled = (visual * v_attn).sum(dim=1)
        
        t_attn = F.softmax(self.t_attn(text), dim=1)
        t_pooled = (text * t_attn).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project and normalize
        v = self.norm_v(self.proj_v(v_pooled))
        t = self.norm_t(self.proj_t(t_pooled))
        
        # Cross-modal interaction
        v_cross = torch.tanh(self.cross_v(t))
        t_cross = torch.tanh(self.cross_t(v))
        
        v_enhanced = v + v_cross
        t_enhanced = t + t_cross
        
        # Gating
        concat = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        v_gated = v_enhanced * gate
        t_gated = t_enhanced * (1 - gate)
        
        # Classify
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        d_model = 128
        n_heads = 4
        
        # Modality projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, d_model)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, d_model)
        
        # Cross-modal attention layers
        self.v2t_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(d_model, n_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.t2v_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(d_model, n_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.v_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.t_norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d_model * 2, d_model),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d_model * 2, 64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 128]
        t = self.t_proj(text)    # [B, 77, 128]
        
        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        v_attended, _ = self.v2t_attn(v, t, t)
        t_attended, _ = self.t2v_attn(t, v, v)
        
        v = self.v_norm(v + v_attended)
        t = self.t_norm(t + t_attended)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 128]
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        g = self.gate(concat)
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled * g, t_pooled * (1 - g)], dim=-1)
        
        return self.head(fused)

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        num_classes = 13
        
        # Attention-based pooling
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Feature projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal interaction with residual
        self.v_to_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        )
        self.t_to_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.v_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.t_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim // 2, num_classes)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.v_attn(visual), dim=1)
        v_pooled = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_attn(text), dim=1)
        t_pooled = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project
        v = self.v_proj(v_pooled)
        t = self.t_proj(t_pooled)
        
        # Cross-modal interaction with residual
        v_enhanced = self.v_norm(v + self.t_to_v(t))
        t_enhanced = self.t_norm(t + self.v_to_t(v))
        
        # Gating fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate(concat))
        fused = gate * v_enhanced + (1 - gate) * t_enhanced
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.hidden_dim = 128
        
        # Projectors
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(1024, self.hidden_dim)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(768, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal bilinear interaction
        self.W_vt = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim, bias=False)
        
        # Feature refinement layers
        self.v_refine = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.t_refine = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        self.gate = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Multi-pooling: mean and max aggregation
        v_mean = visual.mean(dim=1)
        v_max = visual.max(dim=1)[0]
        t_mean = text.mean(dim=1)
        t_max = text.max(dim=1)[0]
        
        # Combine pooling statistics
        v = v_mean + v_max
        t = t_mean + t_max
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v)
        t = self.t_proj(t)
        
        # Bilinear cross-modal interaction
        vt = self.W_vt(v) * t
        
        # Refine features with residual connection
        v = F.relu(self.v_refine(v + vt))
        t = F.relu(self.t_refine(t + vt))
        
        # Concatenate modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate(fused))
        fused = fused * gate
        
        # Classification
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        return out

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        self.num_classes = 13
        
        # Attention pooling
        self.v_attn_pool = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn_pool = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, 1)
        
        # Modality encoders
        self.visual_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        self.text_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.visual_gate = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_gate = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Multiplicative interaction
        self.interaction = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2 + 64, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, self.num_classes)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.v_attn_pool(visual), dim=1)
        v = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_attn_pool(text), dim=1)
        t = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Encode modalities
        v = self.visual_encoder(v)
        t = self.text_encoder(t)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.visual_gate(t))
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.text_gate(v))
        
        v_gated = v * v_gate
        t_gated = t * t_gate
        
        # Multiplicative interaction
        interaction = self.interaction(v_gated * t_gated)
        
        # Fuse and classify
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, interaction], dim=-1)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        # Hardcoded dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        hidden_dim = 512
        fusion_dim = 256
        
        # Modality encoders
        self.visual_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, fusion_dim)
        )
        
        self.text_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, fusion_dim)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=fusion_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Modality-specific gates
        self.visual_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_dim, fusion_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.text_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_dim, fusion_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gate
        self.cross_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_dim * 2, fusion_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_dim * 2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pool = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t_pool = text.mean(dim=1)    # [B, 768]
        
        # Encode modalities
        v = self.visual_encoder(v_pool)  # [B, 256]
        t = self.text_encoder(t_pool)    # [B, 256]
        
        # Self-gating
        v = v * self.visual_gate(v)
        t = t * self.text_gate(t)
        
        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        v_tok = v.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        t_tok = t.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(t_tok, v_tok, v_tok)
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(v_tok, t_tok, t_tok)
        
        v_out = v_cross.squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        t_out = t_cross.squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        concat = torch.cat([v_out, t_out], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        gate = self.cross_gate(concat)  # [B, 256]
        
        fused = torch.cat([v_out * gate, t_out * gate], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        
        return self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        output_dim = 13
        
        # Modality projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Attention pooling
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal transformation
        self.cross = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 3, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, output_dim)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project to hidden dimension
        v = self.v_proj(visual)  # (B, 256, 256)
        t = self.t_proj(text)  # (B, 77, 256)
        
        # Attention-weighted pooling
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.v_attn(v), dim=1)
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_attn(t), dim=1)
        v_pooled = (v * v_weights).sum(dim=1)  # (B, 256)
        t_pooled = (t * t_weights).sum(dim=1)  # (B, 256)
        
        # Element-wise multimodal interaction
        vt_prod = v_pooled * t_pooled  # (B, 256)
        
        # Cross-modal transformation
        concat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # (B, 512)
        cross = self.cross(concat)  # (B, 256)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # (B, 256)
        gated = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # (B, 256)
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        fused = torch.cat([cross, gated, vt_prod], dim=-1)  # (B, 768)
        out = self.classifier(fused)  # (B, 13)
        
        return out

        # Modality-specific projections
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Layer normalization
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries text
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=hidden_dim,
            num_heads=num_heads,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Feature-wise gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, 64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Reduce sequence length: [B, seq, dim] -> [B, dim, reduced] -> [B, reduced, dim]
        v_reduced = self.visual_reduce(visual.transpose(1, 2)).transpose(1, 2)
        t_reduced = self.text_reduce(text.transpose(1, 2)).transpose(1, 2)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.visual_proj(v_reduced)
        t = self.text_proj(t_reduced)
        
        # Cross-attention with pre-LN: visual attends to text
        v_norm = self.ln_v(v)
        t_norm = self.ln_t(t)
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(v_norm, t_norm, t_norm)
        v_fused = self.ln_fused(v + v_attended)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_fused.mean(dim=1)
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Gating mechanism for adaptive fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Classification
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

        )

        )
        self.t_gate = nn.Sequential(

        )

        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.cross_t = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(

        # Encode modalities to common hidden dim

        t_enc = self.t_enc(t)   # (B, 256)
        
        # Cross-modal gating: each modality gates the other
        v_gate = self.v_gate(t_enc)  # text gates visual
        t_gate = self.t_gate(v_enc)  # visual gates text

        v_enhanced = v_gated + torch.tanh(self.cross_v(t_gated))
        t_enhanced = t_gated + torch.tanh(self.cross_t(v_gated))

        fused = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        self.d_model = 256
        self.num_heads = 4
        self.head_dim = self.d_model // self.num_heads
        
        # Project pooled features to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, self.d_model),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.d_model),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, self.d_model),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.d_model),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal self-attention
        self.q_proj = nn.Linear(self.d_model, self.d_model)
        self.k_proj = nn.Linear(self.d_model, self.d_model)
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(self.d_model, self.d_model)
        self.out_proj = nn.Linear(self.d_model, self.d_model)
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.d_model)
        
        # Fusion and classification
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.d_model * 2, self.d_model),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.d_model),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.d_model, 64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        # Global average pooling
        V = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        T = text.mean(dim=1)    # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common dimension
        V = self.visual_proj(V)  # [B, 256]
        T = self.text_proj(T)    # [B, 256]
        
        # Stack modalities as tokens
        tokens = torch.stack([V, T], dim=1)  # [B, 2, 256]
        
        # Multi-head self-attention
        Q = self.q_proj(tokens).view(B, 2, self.num_heads, self.head_dim).transpose(1, 2)
        K = self.k_proj(tokens).view(B, 2, self.num_heads, self.head_dim).transpose(1, 2)
        V_val = self.v_proj(tokens).view(B, 2, self.num_heads, self.head_dim).transpose(1, 2)
        
        attn = torch.matmul(Q, K.transpose(-2, -1)) / (self.head_dim ** 0.5)
        attn = F.softmax(attn, dim=-1)
        attended = torch.matmul(attn, V_val)
        
        attended = attended.transpose(1, 2).contiguous().view(B, 2, self.d_model)
        attended = self.norm(tokens + self.out_proj(attended))
        
        # Fuse and classify
        fused = attended.view(B, -1)  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.fusion(fused)    # [B, 256]
        out = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        # Project modalities to common dimension
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(1024, d_model)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(768, d_model)
        
        # Cross-modal attention (bidirectional)
        self.v2t_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(d_model, 5, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.t2v_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(d_model, 5, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.v_ln = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.t_ln = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d_model * 2, d_model),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d_model * 3, d_model),
            nn.LayerNorm(d_model),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(d_model, 13)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):

        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        v2t, _ = self.v2t_attn(v, t, t)  # Visual queries text
        t2v, _ = self.t2v_attn(t, v, v)  # Text queries visual
        
        # Residual connections
        v = self.v_ln(v + v2t)
        t = self.t_ln(t + t2v)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pool = v.mean(dim=1)
        t_pool = t.mean(dim=1)
        t2v_pool = t2v.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(gate_input)
        fused = gate * v_pool + (1 - gate) * t_pool
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([fused, t_pool, t2v_pool], dim=-1)
        
        return self.classifier(combined)

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        num_classes = 13
        
        # Attention-based pooling for each modality
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Feature projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Feature refinement layers
        self.v_refine = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        )
        self.t_refine = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Gated fusion mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),

        )

        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_attn(text), dim=1)

        t_pool = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project and refine
        v_feat = self.v_refine(self.v_proj(v_pool))
        t_feat = self.t_refine(self.t_proj(t_pool))
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_feat, t_feat], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        fused = gate * v_feat + (1 - gate) * t_feat
        
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Visual projector
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projector
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Feed-forward
        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim * 4),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 4, hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)
        t_pooled = text.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_feat = self.v_proj(v_pooled)
        t_feat = self.t_proj(t_pooled)
        
        # Concatenate for joint processing
        combined = torch.cat([v_feat, t_feat], dim=1)
        
        # Self-attention over modalities
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(combined, combined, combined)
        combined = self.norm1(combined + attn_out)
        
        # FFN
        ffn_out = self.ffn(combined)
        combined = self.norm2(combined + ffn_out)
        
        # Flatten
        flat = combined.view(B, -1)
        
        # Gating
        gate_weights = self.gate(flat)
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = combined[:, 0, :] * gate_weights
        t_gated = combined[:, 1, :] * (1 - gate_weights)
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

        )

        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # B x 1024

        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()

        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        if isinstance(input_dims, dict):
            v = input_dims.get('visual')
            t = input_dims.get('text')
            if isinstance(v, int):
                visual_dim = v
            if isinstance(t, int):
                text_dim = t
        
        hidden_dim = 128
        
        # Attention pooling for sequence aggregation
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Projection layers
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-gating mechanism
        self.visual_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.text_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.concat_fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        self.mult_fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + hidden_dim // 2, hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Attention pooling over sequence dimension
        visual_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(visual), dim=1)
        text_weights = F.softmax(self.text_attn(text), dim=1)
        
        visual_pool = (visual * visual_weights).sum(dim=1)
        text_pool = (text * text_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pool)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pool)
        
        # Cross-gating
        visual_gated = visual_feat * self.visual_gate(text_feat)
        text_gated = text_feat * self.text_gate(visual_feat)
        
        # Multi-path fusion
        concat_fused = self.concat_fusion(torch.cat([visual_gated, text_gated], dim=-1))
        mult_fused = self.mult_fusion(visual_feat * text_feat)
        
        # Combine and classify
        combined = torch.cat([concat_fused, mult_fused], dim=-1)
        out = self.classifier(combined)
        
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Safely extract dimensions - handle tuple/list input
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        if isinstance(input_dims, dict):
            v_info = input_dims.get('visual')
            t_info = input_dims.get('text')
            
            if v_info is not None:
                if isinstance(v_info, int):
                    visual_dim = v_info
                elif isinstance(v_info, (list, tuple)) and len(v_info) > 0:
                    visual_dim = int(v_info[-1])
            
            if t_info is not None:
                if isinstance(t_info, int):
                    text_dim = t_info
                elif isinstance(t_info, (list, tuple)) and len(t_info) > 0:
                    text_dim = int(t_info[-1])
        
        self.d = 128
        self.n_tokens = 16
        
        # Projectors
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(visual_dim),
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, self.d)
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(text_dim),
            nn.Linear(text_dim, self.d)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.d, 4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.ln_cross = nn.LayerNorm(self.d)
        
        # Self-attention
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.d, 4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.ln_self = nn.LayerNorm(self.d)
        
        # Gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.d * 2, self.d),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.d, 64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Adaptive pooling to reduce sequence length
        v = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(visual.transpose(1, 2), self.n_tokens).transpose(1, 2)
        t = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(text.transpose(1, 2), self.n_tokens).transpose(1, 2)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v)
        t = self.t_proj(t)
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries visual
        cross, _ = self.cross_attn(t, v, v)
        t_cross = self.ln_cross(t + cross)
        
        # Self-attention on concatenated features
        concat = torch.cat([v, t_cross], dim=1)
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(concat, concat, concat)
        fused = self.ln_self(concat + self_out)
        
        # Split and pool
        v_out = fused[:, :self.n_tokens].mean(dim=1)
        t_out = fused[:, self.n_tokens:].mean(dim=1)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_out, t_out], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(gate_input)
        fused_out = gate * v_out + (1 - gate) * t_out
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused_out)
        
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        common_dim = 128
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, common_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, common_dim)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries, text keys/values
        self.scale = common_dim ** -0.5
        self.query_proj = nn.Linear(common_dim, common_dim)
        self.key_proj = nn.Linear(common_dim, common_dim)
        self.value_proj = nn.Linear(common_dim, common_dim)
        self.out_proj = nn.Linear(common_dim, common_dim)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.v_ln = nn.LayerNorm(common_dim)
        self.t_ln = nn.LayerNorm(common_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(common_dim * 2, common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(common_dim, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: (B, 256, 1024), text: (B, 77, 768)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # (B, 256, 128)
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, 128)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        Q = self.query_proj(v)
        K = self.key_proj(t)
        V = self.value_proj(t)
        
        attn = torch.matmul(Q, K.transpose(-1, -2)) * self.scale
        attn = F.softmax(attn, dim=-1)
        
        v_attended = torch.matmul(attn, V)
        v_attended = self.out_proj(v_attended)
        v = self.v_ln(v + v_attended)
        
        # Pool
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 128)
        t_pooled = self.t_ln(t).mean(dim=1)  # (B, 128)
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        num_heads = 4
        
        # Modality projections
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: bidirectional
        self.v2t_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden_dim, num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.t2v_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden_dim, num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.v_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.t_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism for fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project to common hidden dimension
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        v_att, _ = self.t2v_attn(v, t, t)  # visual attends to text
        t_att, _ = self.v2t_attn(t, v, v)  # text attends to visual
        
        v = self.v_ln(v + v_att)
        t = self.t_ln(t + t_att)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pool = v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        t_pool = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        fused = gate * v_pool + (1 - gate) * t_pool
        
        # Final classification
        combined = torch.cat([fused, v_pool + t_pool], dim=-1)
        out = self.classifier(combined)
        
        return out

        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.cross_t = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),

        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
